ui_state.loading_description: Data is being loaded and arranged for the current scope and active filters.
ui_state.empty_description: Try adjusting the filters or add new records to populate this area.
ui_state.selection_description: Choose an item from the list to reveal its details and related history.

confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
name: Name
temporary_password_help: Leave this field empty if you want the system to generate a temporary password for the driver.

auth.title: Control trips, drivers, and live tracking from one command surface
auth.intro: A modern operations workspace that brings trips, fleet status, and realtime alerts into one fast and dependable interface.
auth.formIntro: Sign in to access reports, trip tracking, and fleet administration from a dashboard built for daily operations.
auth.emailHint: Use the email assigned to your admin account
auth.passwordHint: Enter the password for your admin account
auth.validationDescription: Enter a valid email address and a password with at least 6 characters
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.capsLockWarning: Caps Lock is on. Check letter casing before signing in.
auth.returningTo: You'll be returned to {section} right after signing in.
auth.sessionActiveDescription: Your account is already recognized, and the app is sending you straight to the dashboard.

auth-required.title: Sign in required
auth-required.description: The page you tried to open is protected, so sign in first to continue.

session-expired.title: Your previous session expired
session-expired.description: For security, sign in again to continue right where you left off.

signed-out.title: Signed out successfully
signed-out.description: You can sign in again at any time to return to the operations dashboard.

auth.loginFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
auth.networkUnavailable: Unable to reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.connectionTimeout: The sign-in request timed out. Check your connection and try again.
auth.secureNote: Sessions stay protected, tokens refresh automatically, and login activity remains observable.
auth.supportingNote: A unified access point for sensitive operations with clearer state visibility and faster day-to-day follow-up.

highlights.secureDescription: Secure authentication with clearer error handling, alerts, and session flow.
highlights.trackingDescription: Watch live trip activity, driver movement, and urgent operational signals.
highlights.fleetDescription: Drivers, trucks, and trips organized inside one cohesive workspace.

company_scope.label: Active Company
company_scope.empty_description: Use the company switcher in the top bar to load company-specific data and realtime tracking.

dashboard_shell.sidebar_summary: A unified operations workspace for fleet movement, alerts, and trip visibility.
dashboard_shell.topbar_summary: Monitor operational performance, recent movement, and live alerts from a calmer unified workspace.
dashboard_shell.auth_check_description: Restoring access and loading the latest workspace state for your account.
dashboard_shell.restore_failed_title: Unable to restore the session right now
dashboard_shell.restore_failed_description: The app could not reach your session data at the moment. Check the connection and try again without being signed out immediately.
dashboard_shell.redirect_description: Your session is no longer available, so the dashboard is sending you back to the access screen.

overview.hero_title: A professional command surface for fleet and trip movement
overview.hero_summary: Track total trips, driver readiness, and live alerts from a landing page designed for quick scanning and faster decisions.
overview.snapshot_note: This snapshot updates according to the selected company scope and the available trip and alert data.
overview.total_trips_note: Trips registered inside the currently selected company scope.
overview.completed_trips_note: Trips that have already been closed successfully.
overview.active_drivers_note: Drivers currently active and ready for assignment.
overview.active_trucks_note: Fleet vehicles currently available for dispatch.
overview.recent_trips_description: A quick view of scheduled or active trips to follow the daily flow.
overview.recent_alerts_description: The most recent alerts that may need attention or operational review.
overview.empty_trips_note: Recent trips will appear here once data starts flowing into the system.
overview.empty_alerts_note: When warnings or critical events appear, they will show up here with severity.

companies_page.description: Organize company profiles, contact details, and operational status from one control surface that keeps the administrative structure ready for the rest of the platform.
companies_page.visible_note: Records currently loaded in the active directory page.
companies_page.active_note: Companies ready for operation inside the currently visible results.
companies_page.inactive_note: Records that are paused or disabled inside the current page.
companies_page.form_create_description: Enter the core company details used across administration and operations.
companies_page.form_edit_description: Adjust contact information or administrative status without leaving the directory screen.
companies_page.filters_description: Quickly search the company directory to reach the right record or narrow the current list.
companies_page.search_placeholder: Search by company name, email, or phone
companies_page.search_hint: The current list updates immediately based on the text entered here.
companies_page.table_description: A clearer view of the companies currently registered in the administrative workspace.

drivers_page.description: Track driver profiles, connection readiness, and activation state from one screen designed for fast scanning and operational decisions.
drivers_page.visible_note: Drivers currently shown inside the active page of results.
drivers_page.online_note: Drivers reporting a live connection inside the current result set.
drivers_page.active_note: Enabled drivers currently ready for assignment in the visible list.
drivers_page.form_create_description: Create a complete driver profile with license details and initial access from the same screen.
drivers_page.form_edit_description: Edit driver information or activation state without leaving the management view.
drivers_page.filters_description: Find the required driver quickly or monitor the current roster by name, phone, or license details.
drivers_page.search_placeholder: Search by driver name, phone, or license number
drivers_page.search_hint: Results tighten instantly as you update the text.
drivers_page.table_description: A structured operational list of drivers with activation and live connection status.

trucks_page.description: Review trucks, available capacity, and readiness status from a fleet view that feels more intentional and operational than the previous layout.
trucks_page.visible_note: Trucks currently shown inside the active fleet result page.
trucks_page.active_note: Fleet vehicles currently enabled and available for operation in the visible set.
trucks_page.capacity_note: Total registered capacity for the trucks currently shown on this page.
trucks_page.form_create_description: Enter the core vehicle details so the truck is ready for assignment and scheduling inside the system.
trucks_page.form_edit_description: Adjust the plate, model, or readiness state from the same management surface.
trucks_page.filters_description: Search the truck list for the right vehicle or narrow the current results without leaving the page.
trucks_page.search_placeholder: Search by plate number, brand, or model
trucks_page.search_hint: The list responds immediately to the entered text while preserving the current company scope.
trucks_page.table_description: A structured list of registered trucks with capacity, activation state, and quick actions.

reports.description: Track trip volume, driver throughput, and alert pressure over a custom time range.
reports.filters_description: Choose the date window and grouping model to extract a sharper operational snapshot.
reports.total_trips_note: Total trips registered inside the current reporting window.
reports.completed_trips_note: Trips that were closed successfully during the same period.
reports.active_trips_note: Trips still in progress during the selected range.
reports.pending_trips_note: Scheduled trips that have not started yet.
reports.active_drivers_note: Enabled drivers whose activity appeared inside this report scope.
reports.active_trucks_note: Ready trucks visible in the current operational data.
reports.trips_trend_description: How scheduled trips moved through the selected period.
reports.driver_performance_description: Top active drivers ranked by completed trips in the selected range.
reports.alert_breakdown_description: Alert volume grouped by type and severity.
reports.no_report_data: No report data available for this period.
reports.invalid_range: The end date must be the same as or later than the start date.

trips_page.description: Filter scheduled work, inspect trip details, and review the recorded track history from one place.
trips_page.search_placeholder: Search by route, notes, driver, or truck
trips_page.visible_note: Trips matching the current filters and search within this page.
trips_page.active_note: Trips still pending or in progress inside the current result set.
trips_page.completed_note: Trips that have been closed successfully in the visible list.
trips_page.cancelled_note: Cancelled or stopped trips inside the current scope.
trips_page.filters_description: Search the scheduled flow quickly, then narrow the results by status, driver, or time range.
trips_page.form_create_description: Enter the route, execution time, and optional driver or truck assignment from the same workspace.
trips_page.table_description: A cleaner operational view of trips with execution status, assignments, and quick cancellation actions.
trips_page.details_description: Review the selected trip and update operational notes without leaving the page.
trips_page.select_trip: Select a trip to inspect its details.
trips_page.notes_description: Capture operational notes or extra instructions linked to this trip.
trips_page.track_history_description: Latest location points recorded for the selected trip.
trips_page.track_unavailable: No driver is currently assigned to this trip, so live track history is not available for it yet.
trips_page.track_history_empty: No tracking points have been recorded for this trip yet.
trips_page.no_track_history: No recorded tracking points for this trip yet.
trips_page.heading: Heading

alerts.description: Monitor incident flow, filter by severity and status, and watch new alerts arrive live.
alerts.total_note: Total alerts currently shown after combining the live feed with the active server results.
alerts.live_note: Alerts received live during the current session.
alerts.unread_note: Unread alerts inside the current list.
alerts.critical_note: Critical severity alerts currently present in the visible results.
alerts.filters_description: Narrow the alert stream by type, severity, and read state so the most important signals surface faster.
alerts.table_description: A more structured view of recent alerts with read state, timing, and quick action controls.
alerts.unread_in_view: Unread alerts in the current view

tracking.description: Follow live driver movement, filter operational activity, and inspect the recent location stream.
tracking.tracked_note: Drivers with available tracking data inside the current company scope.
tracking.online_note: Drivers currently sending live location or connection updates.
tracking.offline_note: Drivers currently offline or not reporting live updates.
tracking.in_trip_note: Drivers currently attached to active trips.
tracking.driver_list_description: Filter the fleet and choose a driver to inspect live position and movement history.
tracking.map_description: A live map view of current driver positions with the active driver highlighted.
tracking.map_disabled_title: Mapbox token is missing or invalid
tracking.map_disabled_description: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN to a valid public Mapbox token to enable the live map. Until then, this page still shows the latest coordinates and activity stream.
tracking.current_position_description: A direct snapshot of the selected driver, current coordinates, and latest observed activity.
tracking.history_description: Latest location updates for the selected driver inside the chosen time window.
tracking.no_history: No location history in this period.
tracking.heading: Heading
tracking.select_driver: Select a driver to view details

settings_page.description: Manage the current interface language and review the active session and profile details from a cleaner settings workspace.
settings_page.language_description: Switch the dashboard language quickly and preserve the preference for future sessions.
settings_page.language_note: Current display language used in this session.
settings_page.session_note: This session is currently running with a secure administrative context.
settings_page.profile_description: Details for the account currently using the dashboard.
settings_page.profile_note: Displayed name and administrative identity for the active account.

location_picker.click_to_set: Click on the map to set the point
location_picker.drag_to_adjust: Drag the pin to adjust location
